diagrams.title: Inheritance Diagram
diagrams.description: A diagram showing the inheritance relationships between classes.

diagrams.title: Polymorphism Diagram
diagrams.description: A diagram showing the different forms of an object.
diagrams.purpose: To illustrate the concept of polymorphism in C++.

diagrams.title: Encapsulation Diagram

diagrams.description: A diagram showing the abstraction of complex systems.
diagrams.purpose: To illustrate the concept of abstraction in C++.

diagrams.title: Composition Diagram
diagrams.description: A diagram showing the composition of objects.
diagrams.purpose: To illustrate the concept of composition in C++.
